title: elymus borealis var. scandicus
intro: Elymus borealis var. scandicus, also known as Scandian wheat-grass or Scandinavian wheat-grass, is a type of wild grass native to the Scandinavian region, characterized by its slender stems and delicate panicles. Traditionally, Elymus borealis var. scandicus has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Elymus borealis var. scandicus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of dried plant material or essential oil for its medicinal properties.
